docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THOMPSON, MALCOLM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOTHERN, ERIC $2,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,320.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED.
